title: Customer.io vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Customer.io vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Customer.io and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. Customer.io is built for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_a: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Customer.io wins for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Customer.io or Postmark?
faq.a: Postmark starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to Customer.io?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
